---
title: "Analytics Modeling From Scratch"
subtitle: "Formula-first walkthroughs for building intuition, code, and judgment"
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

Every walkthrough builds a modeling idea from the ground up. You see the
question the method answers, the formula it relies on, the R code that makes it
concrete, and the judgment calls that matter when the math meets messy data.

## Choose by Goal

| If you need to... | Start with... | Core idea |
|---|---|---|
| Classify observations into known groups | [SVM](svm-from-scratch.qmd) or [KNN](knn-from-scratch.qmd) | Boundaries vs. neighbors |
| Evaluate model performance or avoid overfitting | [Cross-Validation](cross-validation-from-scratch.qmd) | Test on data the model did not see |
| Group unlabeled observations | [K-Means](kmeans-from-scratch.qmd) | Clusters from distance and centroids |
| Detect a shift in process data | [CUSUM](cusum-from-scratch.qmd) | Accumulated evidence of change |
| Forecast future values | [Time Series](time-series-from-scratch.qmd) | Trend, memory, and volatility |
| Predict or explain outcomes | [Regression](regression-from-scratch.qmd) | Linear and logistic relationships |
| Transform skewed data or reduce dimensions | [PCA & Box-Cox](pca-boxcox-from-scratch.qmd) | Better feature geometry |
| Make interpretable if-then rules | [CART](cart-from-scratch.qmd) | Recursive splits and pruning |
| Choose which variables belong in a model | [Variable Selection](variable-selection-from-scratch.qmd) | Bias, variance, shrinkage |
| Design data collection intentionally | [Design of Experiments](doe-from-scratch.qmd) | A/B tests, factorials, bandits |
| Simulate uncertain systems | [Simulation & Markov](simulation-markov-from-scratch.qmd) | Distributions, queues, steady states |
| Handle missing values | [Missing Data](missing-data-from-scratch.qmd) | Missingness mechanisms and imputation |
| Formulate resource decisions | [Optimization](optimization-from-scratch.qmd) | Variables, constraints, objectives |
| Recognize advanced modeling families | [Advanced Topics](advanced-topics-from-scratch.qmd) | A practical vocabulary tour |

## Topic Map

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Classification
- [**SVM From Scratch**](svm-from-scratch.qmd) — Maximum-margin hyperplanes and the kernel trick
- [**KNN From Scratch**](knn-from-scratch.qmd) — Majority vote among nearest neighbors
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Validation
- [**Cross-Validation From Scratch**](cross-validation-from-scratch.qmd) — Why testing on training data is cheating
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Clustering
- [**K-Means From Scratch**](kmeans-from-scratch.qmd) — Finding groups nobody told you about
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Change Detection
- [**CUSUM From Scratch**](cusum-from-scratch.qmd) — Catching the moment everything changed
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Time Series
- [**Time Series From Scratch**](time-series-from-scratch.qmd) — Exponential smoothing, ARIMA, GARCH
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Regression
- [**Regression From Scratch**](regression-from-scratch.qmd) — Linear & logistic regression
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Transformations
- [**PCA & Box-Cox From Scratch**](pca-boxcox-from-scratch.qmd) — Fixing your data before modeling
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Trees
- [**CART From Scratch**](cart-from-scratch.qmd) — If-then rules that think like humans
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Variable Selection
- [**Variable Selection From Scratch**](variable-selection-from-scratch.qmd) — LASSO, ridge, stepwise, and bias-variance tradeoff
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Design of Experiments
- [**DOE From Scratch**](doe-from-scratch.qmd) — A/B testing, factorial designs, multi-armed bandits
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Simulation & Markov
- [**Simulation & Markov From Scratch**](simulation-markov-from-scratch.qmd) — Distributions, QQ plots, M/M/1 queues, steady states
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Missing Data
- [**Missing Data From Scratch**](missing-data-from-scratch.qmd) — MCAR/MAR/MNAR, indicators, imputation strategies
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Optimization
- [**Optimization From Scratch**](optimization-from-scratch.qmd) — LP, binary variables, and why formulation is the hard part
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Advanced Topics
- [**Advanced Topics From Scratch**](advanced-topics-from-scratch.qmd) — Nonparametric, Bayesian, neural nets, game theory, survival, gradient boosting
:::

:::

## Featured Practice

- [**Comprehensive Quiz**](comprehensive-quiz.qmd) - mixed concept checks with short explanations.
- [**Binary Choice Drill**](binary-choice-drill.qmd) - precise true/false-style statements for fast recall.
- [**Confusion Matrix Cost Drill**](confusion-matrix-drill.qmd) - calculate decision costs from false positives and false negatives.
